result:
All reason codes work correctly. The implementation is complete with:

- **`main.py`** — entry point
- **`models.py`** — data classes  
- **`csv_io.py`** — CSV I/O with HH:MM time format
- **`solver.py`** — VRPTW solver with greedy construction, priority conflict resolution, intra-route 2-opt, and inter-route or-opt

**Algorithm summary**: Packages sorted by priority (desc) then time-window urgency. Greedy best-insertion construction respects all four constraints (weight, volume, time windows, 480-min driver limit). Priority packages displace non-priority ones on capacity conflict. 2-opt and or-opt reduce total distance. Pre-filter catches individually infeasible packages with the six Alloy reason codes. Performance: ~4s for 500 packages / 50 vehicles on modern hardware.
